name: Cranberry Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, sift together the flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Stir in the chopped dates, pecans, cranberries, and orange rind.
3. In another bowl, combine the buttermilk, oil, and beaten eggs. Mix well until blended.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
5. Grease a 10-inch Bundt pan and pour in the batter.
6. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 1 hour, or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool on a rack for 20 minutes.
8. Turn the cooled cake out onto foil.
9. For the glaze, bring orange juice and sugar to a boil over medium heat, stirring constantly.
10. Allow the glaze to cool before pouring it over the cooled cake.
11. Wrap the glazed cake in plastic wrap and refrigerate. Do not freeze.
12. This recipe makes 1 torte.
